name: Financial Datasets
description: Access real-time and historical US stock market data, financial statements, income statements, balance sheets, cash flow statements, and earnings data via Financial Datasets AI.

tools_summary.name: get_stock_price
tools_summary.description: Get current and historical stock prices for a ticker symbol

tools_summary.name: get_income_statement
tools_summary.description: Retrieve quarterly or annual income statements for a company

tools_summary.name: get_balance_sheet
tools_summary.description: Retrieve balance sheet data for a company

tools_summary.name: get_cash_flow
tools_summary.description: Retrieve cash flow statements for a company

tools_summary.name: get_company_facts
tools_summary.description: Get key company metadata: sector, industry, market cap, employees

tools_summary.name: search_tickers
tools_summary.description: Search for stock ticker symbols by company name

tools_summary.name: get_earnings
tools_summary.description: Get earnings history and upcoming earnings dates for a company

tools_summary.name: get_insider_trades
tools_summary.description: Get recent insider trading activity for a company

setup_instructions:
1. Sign up at financialdatasets.ai
2. Go to your dashboard and generate an API key
3. Set FINANCIAL_DATASETS_API_KEY to your key
Note: Free tier available with limited monthly requests. Covers US stocks, ETFs, and indices.
